_comment: Guardrails for the flake-triage loop. Set assuming something spins idle overnight: a flake loop re-running the suite N times per candidate, on a daily cron, is a token-blowout risk if left unbounded. Every number below is a hard ceiling, not a suggestion.
_suiteRunsPerCandidate_comment: How many times the suite is re-run to decide if a test is flaky vs. a hard failure, and again by the evaluator to verify a fix. A single green run proves nothing for a flake.
_maxFlakeCandidatesPerRound_comment: Caps how many worktrees/generator agents spin up per discovery round, even if more candidates are found. Excess candidates stay queued in flake-history.md for the next round.
_maxRetriesPerTest_comment: If the generator's fix doesn't pass evaluator review within this many attempts, the test is force-routed to quarantine + inbox instead of retried indefinitely.
_perRunTokenBudget_comment: Approximate token ceiling for a single discovery+fix+review round across all agents combined.
_dailyTokenBudget_comment: Ceiling across all scheduled runs in a 24h period (cloud cron + local Task Scheduler combined). Once hit, remaining candidates wait for the next day's round.
_evaluatorMinimumRuns_comment: Floor on how many times the evaluator must re-run the suite before issuing PASS. Never settable below suiteRunsPerCandidate.
